name: O-I Glass, Inc.
description: O-I Glass, Inc. is a leading global manufacturer of glass containers, providing innovative and sustainable packaging solutions for many of the world's most iconic food and beverage brands. Founded in 1903 and headquartered in Perrysburg, Ohio, the company specializes in the glass container segment of the rigid packaging market. With a commitment to sustainability, O-I Glass focuses on producing infinitely recyclable, healthy, and high-quality glass packaging. The company operates numerous manufacturing facilities across the Americas and Europe, employing thousands of people dedicated to advancing glass technology and design to meet evolving consumer needs.
